title: phlegmariurus talamauanus
intro: Phlegmariurus talamauanus, also known as the Talamau scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus talamauanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
